title: Pushing My AI Dark Factory to Its Limits with Opus + Kimi Combined
summary: Cole Medin's AI Dark Factory uses a hybrid approach that routes complex reasoning tasks to Claude Opus while delegating implementation and validation work to Kimi K2.6. The strategy maintains token efficiency while scaling by applying stronger reasoning only where it meaningfully improves outcomes.
